languages.text: "Не смейте трогать генозамок! Под страхом смерти запрещаю!"
"Don't you dare touch the gene-lock! I forbid it under penalty of death!"
languages.original_text: "Не смейте трогать генозамок! Под страхом смерти запрещаю!"

languages.text: "Wagt es nicht, das Genschloss zu berühren! Ich verbiete es unter Androhung der Todesstrafe!"
languages.original_text: "Don't you dare touch the gene-lock! I forbid it under penalty of death!"

traits.locale_text: "Wagt es nicht, das Genschloss zu berühren! Ich verbiete es unter Androhung der Todesstrafe!"

languages.text: « Je vous interdis de toucher au verrou génétique ! Sous peine de mort ! »
languages.original_text: "Don't you dare touch the gene-lock! I forbid it under penalty of death!"

traits.locale_text: « Je vous interdis de toucher au verrou génétique ! Sous peine de mort ! »

languages.text: «¡No se atreva a tocar el cierre genético! ¡Lo prohíbo so pena de muerte!».
languages.original_text: "Don't you dare touch the gene-lock! I forbid it under penalty of death!"

traits.locale_text: «¡No se atreva a tocar el cierre genético! ¡Lo prohíbo so pena de muerte!».

languages.text: "O gen kilidine dokunmaya cüret etme! Dokunursan ölüm cezasına çarptırılırsın!"
languages.original_text: "Don't you dare touch the gene-lock! I forbid it under penalty of death!"

traits.locale_text: "O gen kilidine dokunmaya cüret etme! Dokunursan ölüm cezasına çarptırılırsın!"

languages.text: “你敢碰基因锁试试！我严令禁止，违者处死！”
languages.original_text: "Don't you dare touch the gene-lock! I forbid it under penalty of death!"

traits.locale_text: “你敢碰基因锁试试！我严令禁止，违者处死！”

languages.text: 「遺伝子ロックに触るものか！死刑をもって禁じる！」
languages.original_text: "Don't you dare touch the gene-lock! I forbid it under penalty of death!"

traits.locale_text: 「遺伝子ロックに触るものか！死刑をもって禁じる！」
